dialogue_texts: Oof... alright. I didn't realize you're in a real hurry. Now I get it.
Finally. Now, which way to the mansion? The air is getting even worse further in.
Just follow the reddest leaves toward Yumemura.
But be careful - the closer you get, the more 'gloomy' it will feel!
'Gloomy' is right. I'm off. Try not to trip over your own wings on the way out.
